summary: Todo bundles 4-5 deliverables across backend (todo-store schema migration + first-class epic kind), the add_session_todo guard, FleetGraph UI (render-by-kind + tests), AND a retroactive migration that MUTATES THE LIVE production todo DB the running pool depends on (plus 'appropriate epics' grouping = planning judgment). Escalated a split-decision rather than unilaterally mutating live state or thrashing on a too-big todo.
